title: Account Manipulation
description: Hunt for suspicious account changes that improve persistence, privilege, or access durability.
hypothesis_templates: An adversary modified account settings or permissions to preserve or expand access.
Administrative changes to an identity object are inconsistent with the user or operator's normal behavior.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, business unit, or environment selector.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: Hours of identity audit telemetry to review.

parameters.name: focus_user
parameters.description: Optional user or admin account to prioritize.

telemetry_requirements.description: Directory and IAM audit logs for role, password, MFA, or group changes.
Correlate account changes with alerts, admin sessions, or follow-on activity.

blind_spots: Identity changes executed through unmanaged admin planes may not be fully captured.
Bulk sync or provisioning jobs can produce noisy changes that need business context to resolve.

execution_targets.name: Okta admin-change sweep
execution_targets.description: Review System Log events that modify users, factors, groups, or policies.
execution_targets.query_template: eventType co "user" and outcome.result eq "SUCCESS" and actor.alternateId co "{{focus_user}}"

execution_targets.name: M365 identity change sweep
execution_targets.description: Inspect Microsoft identity audit surfaces for suspicious account or role changes.

execution_targets.name: Splunk persistence-change correlation
execution_targets.description: Correlate account changes with unusual follow-on activity or detections.

notes: Use this pack when suspicious role, MFA, password, or group changes are in scope.
